parameters.query:
INSERT INTO properties (listing_id, title, price, price_currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, property_type, suburb, city, province, url, source, description, agent_name, scraped_at, status, size_sqm)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.listing_id }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.price || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.price_currency }}',
  {{ $json.bedrooms }},
  {{ $json.bathrooms }},
  '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  '{{ $json.suburb }}',
  '{{ $json.city }}',
  '{{ $json.province }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.sender_email }}',
  '{{ $json.scraped_at }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  {{ $json.size_sqm || 0 }}
)
ON CONFLICT (listing_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, listing_id;
